scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep after identity190. Scope is project aliases only. Live deterministic inspection still leaves only project duplicate identity pairs that fail project-vs-program, phase/subproject, contract/amendment, support-bundle, location, or same-name-different-agency guards.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch194-prep.json. No merges.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical JSONL, canonical DB, materialized outputs, or wiki files were edited.

deterministic_inspection.method: Read-only validateRepo() via bun --eval plus canonical JSONL and current identity override inspection.

candidate_limit.requested: up to 8 high-confidence project aliases if possible
candidate_limit.note: No current project duplicate pair cleared semantic review. The safe batch is intentionally empty rather than padding with low-confidence aliases.

blockers.detail: All 13 live project duplicate identity pairs remain semantic traps or mixed-scope clusters. Shared identity keys are caused by broad labels, embedded aliases, or parent/child context rather than sufficient same-project evidence.
Several deferred pairs include records that are already merge targets. No acyclic cluster collapse is proposed because the underlying project identities are not proven equivalent.

inspections.purpose: Read-only live validation scan for duplicate_global_identity issues restricted to Global project records.
Collected current project record summaries, aliases, payload fields, evidence refs, and merge-target guard status for the live duplicate pairs.

inspections.command: jq/read-only inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
inspections.purpose: Checked current project alias override count, do-not-merge count, current alias targets, and existing merge-target traps without editing overrides.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 and project_2017-street-improvement-79th share identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project.
Global project records project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 and project_2017-street-improvement-79th share identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project-woodhaven-blvd.
source_evidence: project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024: Queens/Woodhaven Boulevard/Q52-Q53 SBS bus-lane work.
project_2017-street-improvement-79th: Manhattan/M79 Select Bus Service street improvement context, with merged Woodhaven aliases also present.
deferred.reason: Location and route scope mismatch. The shared 2017 Street Improvement Project wording is too broad and the second record is already polluted by mixed Manhattan and Queens field values.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 and project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025 share identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project.
source_evidence: project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024: completed Woodhaven Boulevard bus-lane work in Queens.
project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025: completed 79th Street/M79 SBS street improvement project in Manhattan.
deferred.reason: Location mismatch: Woodhaven Boulevard in Queens versus 79th Street in Manhattan. Same-year generic project wording is not same-project evidence.

conductor_apply_note: Do not apply any project aliases from this artifact. Re-run validation after other identity work; if these pairs remain, they are better candidates for do-not-merge review, identity-key cleanup, or source-specific canonical repair than merge overrides.
